channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The pro-AI movement is splintering
item.description: The pro-AI movement is splintering over a defining question: whether national security concerns outweigh the need to keep America's AI companies ahead...

item.title: Jonathan Swan outlines three key insights about Trump for CEOs
item.description: I rarely read books about Trump. To me, his thinking and governance are not mysterious, so reading about them seems inefficient.

item.title: Democratic rebellion mirrors Tea Party, fueled by decade of discontent
item.description: Democratic leaders worry they face a Tea Party-style revolt from within, rooted in 17 years of frustration they cannot control.

item.title: Key changes coming to student loans on July 1
item.description: Starting next month, borrowers will face major student loan changes, including fewer repayment options under Trump's tax and spending policies.
